01 — About Me

The Mind Behind
The Machine

Hello! I'm Obidul Islam Seam — a driven Computer Science student, full-stack developer, and marketing professional based in Bangladesh. I am currently pursuing my BSc in Computer Science & Engineering at The University of Scholars.

My passion lies in building seamless digital experiences — from architecting robust back-end systems to crafting beautiful, responsive front-end interfaces. I believe technology is not just code; it's the bridge between ideas and impact.

Beyond development, I bring hands-on experience in tele-sales marketing at Synergy Business Solution — giving me a rare blend of technical expertise and business acumen that sets me apart.
